title: Authentication bypass allows unauthenticated access to admin routes
body: Discovered that the login handler doesn't properly validate JWT tokens, allowing bypass of authentication.

title: Add WebSocket support for real-time updates
body: We need WebSocket support for the dashboard to show real-time status updates.

title: API rate limiting is not working correctly
body: Rate limiter allows more requests than configured limit.

title: Documentation needs updated installation steps
body: Current README has outdated install instructions that don't work with Node 20.

title: Improve test coverage for auth module
body: Auth module currently has 45% coverage, needs to be at least 80%.
